When sysinstall is rerun after install and used for any disk-related work,
IDE devices will appear twice, once for old-device names, once for new ones.

Fix: 

Not known, but presumably involves toasting the old device entries which
are presumably there for compatibility?
How-To-Repeat: 
o Install
o Rerun /stand/sysinstall
o Go do post-install Configuration, then Fdisk
